name: Green Bean & Onion Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Stir in the flour until smooth, cooking for about 2 minutes.
3. Add the mustard, salt, and Tabasco sauce; stir to combine.
4. Gradually add milk to form a thick mixture (about 1 1/2 cups).
5. Stir in the green beans and onions until evenly coated.
6. Transfer the mixture to a greased 1-quart casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle buttered bread cubes on top of the vegetables.
8. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, or until the bread crumbs are golden brown.
